column1: This file contains the cyanotoxin, chlorophyll, and cyanobacterial toxin genetic data for samples collected at eleven large river sites throughout the United States, from June through September 2017. Definitions of column headings presented in the "Cyanotoxins_Chl_Genetics_Data" tab are presented below.
Station ID, USGS station identification number where samples were collected (01184000, 01463500, 01578310, 02338000, 03303280, 05331580, 06892350, 06934500, 08057410, 11447650, and 14211720).

Station Name, USGS station name where samples were collected (Connecticut  River at Thompsonville, CT; Delaware River at Trenton, NJ; Susquehanna River at Conowingo, MD; Chattahoochee River near Whitesburg, GA; Ohio River at Cannelton Dam at Cannelton, OH; Mississippi River at Hastings, MN; Kansas River at De Soto, KS; Missouri River at Hermann, MO; Trinity River below Dallas, TX; Sacramento River at Freeport, CA; and Willamette River at Portland, OR).
State, State where samples were collected (CT, NJ, MD, GA, OH, MN, KS, MO, TX, CA, and OR).
Date, Date samples were collected in MM/DD/YYYY.
Time, Time samples were collected in HH:MM; "NA" indicated lab replicate and no time offset.
Sample Type, Type of sample collected (Regular sample, Concurrent replicate, or Laboratory Replicate).

Data qualifiers for Total microcystins plus nodularins, data qualifiers for attribute labeled Total microcystins plus nodularins (ug/L); <; less than symbol indicates concentration was less than the laboratory reporting level.

Total microcystins plus nodularins (ug/L), Total microcystins plus nodularins, unfiltered water, freeze/thaw extraction. ADDA specific enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay, recoverable, micrograms per liter (USGS parameter code 89011); refer to prior attribute for associated data qualifier; "NM" indicates value was not measured.
